rules.name: Three Knots — Old-School Rules
rules.author: Three Knots Project
rules.description: A B/X-flavored OSR ruleset for The Haunting of Three Knots. 3d6 abilities, categorical saves, no skills, no damage types, morale and reaction rolls, gold-as-XP. Designed for short dungeon crawls — lethal and atmospheric.
rules.design_philosophy: Classic dungeon crawl: death is a real outcome, treasure is the point, and the dungeon decides.

fighter.name: Fighter
fighter.description: Front-line warrior. Best hit die, all armor and all weapons. No special abilities — the sword is the point.

cleric.name: Cleric
cleric.description: Armored holy warrior. Any armor, no edged weapons. Turns undead; learns divine spells from level 2.

magic_user.name: Magic-User
magic_user.description: Frail scholar of the arcane. No armor, dagger or staff only. Memorizes spells daily; one spell at level 1.

thief.name: Thief
thief.description: Light-fingered survivor. Leather armor, simple weapons. Backstab, stealth, and the usual x-in-6 thief skills.

conditions.name: Charmed
conditions.description: You regard the charmer as a trusted friend. You will not attack them or knowingly act against them.
conditions.effect: The character cannot attack or harm the charmer; they obey reasonable requests short of self-destruction. They are not charmed against their will once the charmer acts against them.
conditions.removal: Until the charmer attacks you, the spell is dispelled, or the spell's duration ends.

conditions.name: Held
conditions.description: A spell or effect has locked your body. You cannot move or act.
conditions.effect: No movement, no actions, no speech. Attacks against the held character hit automatically.
conditions.removal: When the spell ends, is dispelled, or a save against Spells at the end of each turn succeeds (if the effect allows).

conditions.name: Sleeping
conditions.description: Unnaturally asleep. You will not wake to noise, but a hard shake or an attack rouses you.
conditions.effect: Unconscious; helpless. Attacks hit automatically. Sleep ends immediately if the sleeper takes damage; a combatant can be shaken or slapped awake as an action.
conditions.removal: On taking damage, being shaken awake, or at the end of the effect's duration.

conditions.name: Paralyzed
conditions.effect: No movement, no actions, no speech. Attacks against paralyzed targets hit automatically.
conditions.removal: When the spell or effect ends; commonly 2d4 turns.

conditions.name: Cursed
conditions.description: Something ancient has fastened on you. Your luck has turned.
conditions.effect: −1 on all attack rolls, saves, and checks for the duration of the curse. The effect may worsen over time at the GM's discretion.
conditions.removal: Remove curse spell, destruction of the cursed object, or fulfillment of the curse's terms.

conditions.name: Poisoned
conditions.description: A toxin is working through you.
conditions.effect: −2 on attack rolls and on all ability checks until the poison passes or is cured.
conditions.removal: Cure poison spell, antitoxin, or natural recovery after 1d6 turns for mild poisons.

difficulty.auto_success: Tasks a competent adventurer does without thinking: walking a safe road, lighting a torch, reading a familiar language.
difficulty.auto_failure: Tasks physically or mentally impossible with the resources at hand. Describe why, then move on.
